description: Canonical registry of approved agent skill packages. Agents must discover skills via this index and load via scripts/skill-load.sh.

skills.name: agile
skills.description: AInchors Agile delivery framework — sprint cadence, ceremonies, work-item rules, priority, and Definition of Done.

skills.name: changelog
skills.description: Create and manage CHG records for every structural platform change.

skills.name: crest
skills.description: CREST execution framework for planning, verification, and delivery.

skills.name: model-routing
skills.description: Model tier assignments and cost routing policy.

skills.name: notion
skills.description: AInchors Notion integration patterns — auth, DB IDs, API conventions, rate limits, and common operations for tickets, backlog, and Holocron.

skills.name: subagent-dispatch
skills.description: Safe OpenClaw subagent dispatch rules: workspace access, timeout enforcement, tool budgets, kill policies.

skills.name: telegram
skills.description: Telegram chunking and alert routing rules.

skills.name: memory-maintenance
skills.description: Ensure daily memory and journal facts that change master state are promoted to MEMORY.md and context handoff delta documents. Prevents drift between daily source-of-truth files and long-term master references.
